name: bom_number_present
expression: bom_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(bom_number)) > 0
description: bom_number is required for Bill of Materials extraction.

name: bom_revision_present
expression: bom_revision IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(bom_revision)) > 0
description: bom_revision is required for Bill of Materials extraction.

name: parent_part_number_present
expression: parent_part_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(parent_part_number)) > 0
description: parent_part_number is required for Bill of Materials extraction.

name: component_items_present
expression: component_items IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(component_items) > 0
description: component_items is required for Bill of Materials extraction.
